title: Plex Systems Wins National Best and Brightest Companies To Work For
text: TROY, Mich., Feb. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Plex Systems, a Rockwell Automation Company and the leader in cloud-delivered smart manufacturing solutions, has been named to the list of Winter 2021 Best and Brightest Companies To Work For® in the nation for the 7th year in a row, as recognized by the National Association for Business Resources (NABR).

title: Wall Street Can't Make Its Mind Up Over This Growth Stock
text: Automation is a hot industry to invest in, but is America's leading player the best value in the sector?

title: Rockwell Automation Elects Robert Soderbery to Board of Directors
text: MILWAUKEE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), the world's largest company dedicated to industrial automation and digital transformation, announced today that Robert Soderbery was elected to its board of directors effective Feb. 2, 2022. Soderbery is currently executive vice president and general manager, Flash Business Unit, at Western Digital. “Rob brings over 30 years of experience in the tech industry and will be a terrific addition to the Rockwell Automation board of di

title: Kalypso Grows Workforce by 24% in 2021, Expands Service Offerings to Support Clients' End-to-End Digital Transformation and Sustainability Goals
text: MILWAUKEE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kalypso, a professional services firm helping some of the world's largest and most influential companies discover, create, make and sell better products with digital, today announced a growing global workforce and an expanding array of capabilities and service offerings to support a wider set of clients with their digital transformations.
